summary:
The patient scores 4 for eye-opening due to responsiveness only when spoken to; orientates well with words but doesn't need commands so gets full marks there at 5/5; has good muscle strength showing movement across both upper & lower body parts scoring maximum possible i.e., 6 out of six making total as per GCS scale being 15 indicating high level consciousness post intubation and MV support.
